hazards.name: Extreme Cold
hazards.summary: At 0°F or lower, exposed creatures must succeed on a DC 10 Constitution save each hour or gain 1 Exhaustion level.

hazards.name: Extreme Heat
hazards.summary: At 100°F or higher without drinkable water, Constitution saves each hour or gain Exhaustion.

hazards.name: Deep Water
hazards.summary: Swimming in water over 100 feet deep requires a DC 10 Constitution save each hour without Swim Speed or gain Exhaustion.

hazards.name: Difficult Terrain
hazards.summary: Each foot of movement costs 1 extra foot in rubble, dense growth, or steep stairs.

hazards.name: Dim Light
hazards.summary: Lightly obscured area; creatures rely on senses that don't require sight.

hazards.name: Darkness
hazards.summary: Heavily obscured; effectively blinded without darkvision or light.

hazards.name: Slippery Surfaces
hazards.summary: Wet or algae-covered stone; Dexterity checks to avoid falling have Disadvantage.

hazards.name: Unstable Ceiling
hazards.summary: Loud noise or impact may trigger a collapsing section.
